main.description: An authenticated Creaton forum body encrypted under a board epoch key.

epoch.description: UTC key epoch in YYYY-MM-DD form.

committeeEpoch.description: Required for version 2 content; identifies the CREATE-elected threshold committee.

keyEpochUri.description: Required for version 2 content; points to the public threshold-wrapped board key capsule.

keyCapsuleUri.description: Required for version 3 content; points to the per-record threshold-DH key capsule.

salt.description: Random 32-byte salt used to derive the per-record content key.

ciphertext.description: AES-256-GCM ciphertext including its authentication tag.
